name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* --specification TwoPhaseCommit

  (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
  sendPrepare() == 
    LET prepareMsg == [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "All"] IN
    messages' = Append(messages, prepareMsg) /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Participants respond with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
  participantResponds(i) == 
    LET participant == participants[i] IN

      (* For simplicity, assume all participants vote yes *)
      LET voteMsg == [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> participant.id, to |-> coordinator.id] IN
      messages' = Append(messages, voteMsg) /\ 
      participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = [@ WITH state |-> "VotedYes"]]

      UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  (* Coordinator decides to commit or abort *)
  coordinatorDecides() == 
    LET allVotedYes == \A i \in 1..N : 
          \E m \in messages : 
            m.type = "VoteYes" /\ m.from = i /\ m.to = coordinator.id
    IN

      LET commitMsg == [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "All"] IN
      messages' = Append(messages, commitMsg) /\ 
      coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state |-> "Committed"] /\ 
      participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = [@ WITH state |-> "Committed"] : i \in 1..N]

      LET abortMsg == [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "All"] IN
      messages' = Append(messages, abortMsg) /\ 
      coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state |-> "Aborted"] /\ 
      participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = [@ WITH state |-> "Aborted"] : i \in 1..N]
  (* Participants update state upon receiving Commit or Abort *)
  participantUpdates(i) == 
    LET participant == participants[i] IN

      LET msg == [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "All"] IN
      messages' = Append(messages, msg) /\ 
      participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = [@ WITH state |-> "Committed"]]

      UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  (* Main loop *)
  main == 
    sendPrepare() /\ 
    \A i \in 1..N : participantResponds(i) /\ 
    coordinatorDecides() /\ 
    \A i \in 1..N : participantUpdates(i)
end specification *)

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)

(* Types *)
Forks == [1..N -> 0..1]  (* 0: free, 1: held *)
PhilosopherStates == [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0 /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 1, ![RightFork(i)] = 1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0, ![RightFork(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating == \A i \in 1..N :
                    states[i] = "eating" => states[RightFork(i)] # "eating"

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in Forks
          /\ states \in PhilosopherStates

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
        /\ flag = <<>>

Next == /\ num' = num + 1
        /\ flag' = Append(flag, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT, CHUNK_DATA

VARIABLES receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, chunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file = CHUNK_DATA
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> 
            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> 0]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = [i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> FALSE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT :
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
    \/ \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT :
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ receivedChunks' = [receivedChunks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT :
        /\ retransmitCount[i] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets[j] = offsets[j] + 1
        /\ offsets[j] = offsets[j] - 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE, ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ p \in free
        /\ c \in Client
        /\ p \in Pages
        /\ p \notin allocated[c]
        /\ \A c' \in Client : c' \in Client \ {c} => allocated'[c'] = allocated[c']

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants[0] = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1], turn>>
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
